documents.name: chunking
documents.markdown:
# Chunking

## Overview

Before embedding, each document is split into overlapping chunks of a configurable size (300 words by default) with a small overlap (5% by default) so that context is not lost at chunk boundaries.

## Heading context

Each chunk is prefixed with the heading path of its section so the embedded text retains its structural context.

documents.name: embeddings
documents.markdown:
# Embeddings

The default embedding provider is Ollama running the bge-m3 model, which produces 1024-dimensional vectors. Alternative providers include Google Gemini and a local ONNX model.

documents.name: retrieval
documents.markdown:
# Retrieval

## Hybrid

Hybrid retrieval fuses dense vector search with sparse BM25 keyword search using Reciprocal Rank Fusion.

## HyDE

HyDE asks the language model to write a hypothetical answer, then embeds that answer to drive the vector search.

## Multi-Query

Multi-Query rewrites the question into several diverse queries and fuses their results.

documents.name: storage
documents.markdown:
# Storage

Documents and their chunks are stored in two separate tables. The default backend is SQLite; PostgreSQL with the pgvector extension is also supported.

queries.query: what is the default chunk size and overlap
which embedding model is used by default and how many dimensions
how does hybrid search combine methods
